name: Mixtral 8x7B (MoE)
training_approach: pretraining with 8 sparse expert groups, top-2 routing per token
lineage_path: MoE concept (Jacobs 1991) -> Sparsely-Gated MoE (Shazeer 2017) -> Switch Transformer -> Mixtral 8x7B
summary: Mixtral 8x7B was the first open-weights sparse MoE model to achieve frontier-quality results, matching LLaMA 2 70B and GPT-3.5 while using only 12.9B active parameters per token out of 46.7B total. Released by Mistral AI, it proved that sparse MoE could be practically deployed in open-source settings with dramatic efficiency gains, accelerating adoption of expert routing across the industry and validating MoE as the path forward for efficient scaling.
